title: Accenture SAP TM Stream Training - Final Capstone Project
objective: Analyze the business scenario, design an SAP Transportation Management solution following SAP Best Practices, prepare all required deliverables and defend the proposed solution during the final viva.
learningObjectives: Design SAP TM solution using standard best practices
Define planning, execution, and settlement approach
Identify consolidation and carrier strategy opportunities
Defend solution decisions in final viva

sections.content: You have recently joined Accenture as an Associate Software Engineer and completed the SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management learning journey. As part of the final stream assessment, you have been assigned an individual capstone project. Your objective is to analyze the client's transportation challenges and propose a complete SAP TM solution using SAP standard functionality wherever possible.

FreshMart Retail distributes packaged food products across South India. Transportation planning is currently performed manually. Different planners use different planning approaches, resulting in inconsistent carrier selection, poor truck utilization, delivery delays and increasing transportation costs. Senior management has approved the implementation of SAP S/4HANA Embedded Transportation Management.

items: Transportation planning requires approximately 4 hours every morning.
Vehicles frequently depart with unused capacity.
Multiple shipments travel to the same destination independently.
Different planners select different carriers for similar deliveries.
Transportation costs have increased by 14% during the last financial year.
Business users cannot monitor shipment status centrally.
Freight invoice verification is performed manually.

sections.content: This assignment intentionally does not specify which SAP TM objects, configuration activities or business documents should be used. Your responsibility is to identify the appropriate SAP TM solution based on the business scenario. Wherever multiple solutions are possible, justify your recommendation using SAP Best Practices.

items: Analyze the business scenario and identify the transportation challenges.
Identify all business master data required for the solution.
Recommend an appropriate transportation planning strategy.
Identify transportation KPIs for management reporting.
Prepare recommendations for future process improvements.
